name: ruby-async-dns
title: ruby-async-dns
summary: easy to use DNS client resolver and server for Ruby
description:
easy to use DNS client resolver and server for Ruby
Async::DNS provides a high-performance DNS client resolver and server which
can be easily integrated into other projects or used as a stand-alone daemon.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-async-dns because easy to use DNS client resolver and server for Ruby.

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-async-dns with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-async-dns --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
